_meta.description: Scope 3 screening emission factors for the BRSR P6 Leadership indicator (Scope 3 GHG). Activity/distance-based factors per the GHG Protocol Corporate Value Chain (Scope 3) Standard.
_meta.methodology: GHG Protocol Corporate Value Chain (Scope 3) Accounting and Reporting Standard + Scope 3 Technical Guidance — distance/activity-based methods.
_meta.factor_source: UK Government (DEFRA/DESNZ) Greenhouse Gas Reporting: Conversion Factors 2024, condensed set v1.1 (30 Oct 2024).
_meta.radiative_forcing: Air-travel and air-freight factors include radiative forcing (RF), i.e. the full climate impact of emissions at altitude, per DEFRA's default.
_meta.freight_basis: Freight factors are 'combined' = direct (tank-to-wheel) + well-to-tank (WTT), the full value-chain emissions of the transport.
_meta.scope_note: Covers the operational Scope 3 categories that are computable from physical activity data: Cat 4/9 transport & distribution, Cat 5 waste, Cat 6 business travel, Cat 7 employee commuting. Category 1 (purchased goods & services) is NOT included — it needs supplier-specific or spend-based (EEIO) data, and no authoritative India spend-factor set exists; add it from supplier data for a complete inventory.
_meta.status_note: BRSR Scope 3 is a Principle 6 Leadership indicator — voluntary and not under reasonable assurance in 2026 (Scope 1 & 2 are the mandatory/assured ones). Treat this as a screening estimate; a certified GHG auditor should sign off on final disclosures.
_meta.vintage_note: DEFRA 2024 v1.1 is the cited set. Refresh against the latest DEFRA/DESNZ conversion factors each filing year.

waste.note: Landfill = full gate-to-grave; recycling/combustion/composting = transport-to-facility (the standard's recurring constants). Only 'mixed' landfill is offered here so every figure stays an exact published value; per-material landfill (paper, wood, food) can be added later.

factors.label: To landfill (mixed C&I)
factors.source: DEFRA 2024 v1.1, Waste disposal — Commercial & industrial waste, Landfill

factors.label: To recycling
factors.source: DEFRA 2024 v1.1, Waste disposal — Recycling (closed-loop, transport to facility)

factors.label: To combustion / EfW
factors.source: DEFRA 2024 v1.1, Waste disposal — Combustion (transport to facility)

factors.label: To composting / AD
factors.source: DEFRA 2024 v1.1, Waste disposal — Composting / anaerobic digestion (transport to facility)
